tasks.instruction: Add 2 tickets for the cheapest jazz concert happening between June 12 and June 14, with tickets priced under $30, to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Create a weekend schedule by adding 3 events on the upcoming Saturday and Sunday at different venues within 5 km of the city center to your schedule list.

tasks.instruction: Bookmark 2 rock bands that each have a rating of at least 4 stars and at least one upcoming show within the next 30 days, then open your favorites list.
